title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the second race of the Classic Triple
Crown, the Japanese Derby. I ask dorm leader
Hishi Amazon to wake up Seiun Sky so she won't
be late.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokyo Racecourse is fired up to see the big three
face off. The clear favorite to win is Special
Week, to whom victory in the Derby has been a
personal dream.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But, of course, she's not the only one dreaming to
win. The big three battle once again!
